description_long: This is a modern, four-door police car with a white body and distinctive police markings. The vehicle features a blue and red light bar mounted on the roof, and the word 'POLICE' is faintly visible along the sides. The roof displays a large red number '034', and the rear is marked with high-visibility red and yellow chevrons and a yellow 'POLICE' label. The car has tinted windows, silver alloy wheels, and black trim around the windows and lower body. The front bumper has a yellow reflective strip, and the overall design is typical of urban law enforcement vehicles.
description: A white, modern police car with blue and red roof lights, police markings, and high-visibility rear chevrons.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'POLICE' text on the door, blue and red roof light bar, and alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the yellow reflective strip on the bumper, tinted windshield, and roof light bar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible 'POLICE' text, roof number, and alloy wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying red and yellow chevrons, large '034' on the roof, and a yellow 'POLICE' label.
attribute_police_markings: The word 'POLICE' is faintly visible in large, light-colored letters along both sides of the vehicle. The roof displays a large red number '034'. The rear features a yellow 'POLICE' label on the bumper and high-visibility red and yellow chevrons. The front bumper has a yellow reflective strip.
attribute_emergency_lights: A blue and red rectangular light bar is mounted centrally on the roof. No other emergency lights are visible on the grille or rear.
attribute_license_plate: A yellow license plate is visible at the rear, with the word 'POLICE' in black text. No front license plate is visible.
